---
title: "Portfolio"
author: ""
comments: false
body-classes: portfolio-page
description: "This portfolio includes works, software, and tools I have designed or contributed to turn data into decisions"
listing: 
  contents: portfolio
  type: grid
  fields: 
    - title
    - categories
    - description
    - date
    - image
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  image-align: left
  image-height: 100%
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
